prompt: The URL shortener design at board/spec/url-shortener.md was brainstormed (and approved) and moved from board/idea/. Apply the infinifu:spec-writing skill to replace that file's design content with a concrete implementation spec for a junior engineer who doesn't know our codebase. After saving the spec, STOP — do not invoke spec-refinement, do not create bd tasks, do not write any source/test files. I just want to inspect the spec file.

assertions.text: board/spec/url-shortener.md still exists and was modified (content differs from seed design)
Spec starts with '# <Feature> Implementation Plan' header pattern
Spec contains the 'For Claude:' handoff line referencing plan-scrum-master or plan-supervised
Spec header includes all three fields: Goal:, Architecture:, Tech Stack:
Spec contains at least 3 tasks (## or ### Task N: headings)
At least one task contains a failing-test code block (pytest assertion)
At least one task contains an implementation code block (Python code)
At least one task specifies exact file paths (src/services/shortener/... with a concrete filename)
At least one task includes a git commit command
At least one task includes a run-the-test command with expected outcome (FAIL or PASS)
No implementation files created in src/ or tests/ (no new .py files beyond seed)
No new git commits after the seed (agent saved spec but did not commit)
